headline: Boston Scientific Pairs US$2b Buyback With MiRus TAVR Growth Bet
summary: Boston Scientific (NYSE:BSX) announced a US$2b accelerated share repurchase program. The company also agreed to invest US$1.5b in MiRus, securing a significant equity stake. The MiRus deal includes an exclusive option related to the company’s transcatheter aortic valve replacement (TAVR) business. Boston Scientific, a large medical device company focused on cardiovascular and other interventional therapies, is pairing a sizeable capital return with a move deeper into structural heart...
